title: Blane's Improved Minecraft
description: A modpack with far too many mods made for a youtube series
body:
A modpack that includes all the mods you could possibly need, although i did prioritize mods with more polish. Created for a youtube series.




note: i have removed some curseforge mods that i use in the series.
those are
item filters, ftb quests and its requirements, ftb xmod compatabilty, goblin traders, and framework.
